MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Dawn Hassell, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Melissa Dicks

No other appearance. Plaintiff Melissa Dick's Motion To Compel Compliance With Prior Discovery Order as supplemental responses have been service. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion And Request For Sanctions is denied.

Notice Of Pltf'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Document Production, And Request For Attorney'S Fees And Costs; Pos
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kathryn Tanner, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Melissa Dicks
No other appearance

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff MELISSA DICKS' Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Document Production is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond further and to produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
